name: Chicken & Dumplins
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the chicken until cooked through.
2. Use spices such as sage, basil, oregano, rosemary, garlic, and salt to boil with the chicken.
3. De-bone the chicken once cooked.
4. Add the soup, milk, and lemon pepper to a pot of boiling chicken broth.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Mix the milk and Bisquick together. (If you have your own dumpling recipe, use that instead.)
7. Drop small spoonfuls of the mixture into the broth.
8. Cover for 5 minutes, then uncover for another 5 minutes.
9. Let cool slightly before serving. Use lemon pepper to taste; avoid using much salt as the soup already contains plenty.
